_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the rpa-session-creation-timeout scenario (job-faulted-session-timeout playbook, cause 1 - known Robot defect on versions < 23.10). The agent derives keys by chaining: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get -> jobs logs -> jobs history -> machines list. The Robot version 23.4.7 (< 23.10) on RECON-BOT-01 is the discriminating evidence; the 'Creating user session timed out' string (no logon-failure code) rules out job-faulted-logon-failure, and the Pending->Running->Faulted history rules out no-host/Pending. Specific rules precede generic ones so first-match-wins picks the narrower fixture.

rules._doc: Proxy any docsai query to the real uip CLI; query strings vary between runs so canned responses go stale. Optional corroboration step in the playbook - an empty/failed KB result is not disconfirming.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched above returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
